chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Reward of Visiting the Prophet {saws} and the Imams {a.s}, Peace Be Upon Them All

text: 3168 - وَ رَوَى إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «مَا بَيْنَ قَبْرِ اَلْحُسَيْنِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ إِلَى اَلسَّمَاءِ اَلسَّابِعَةِ مُخْتَلَفُ اَلْمَلاَئِكَةِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3168 - Ishaq ibn Ammar has narrated from Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) who said:
"Between the grave of Husayn (as) and the seventh heaven is a pathway frequented by the angels."
